scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --env-file backend/.env --reload --reload-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000"
scripts.dev:backend: python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --env-file backend/.env --reload --reload-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
